last_successful_step: T003 step 4.3 finalized on 2026-03-14: canonical-key validation now runs against the frozen normalized/checkpoint Parquet artifacts, the supervisor UI preserves the legacy BRCA baseline separately from the Arab-extension checkpoints, and every derived review artifact now has a static GCS CSV download. T003 step 5.1 remains in progress after the 2026-03-16 download-center hardening pass: the artifact center now exposes every displayed GCS file with its gs:// path and manifest/report companions, GCS object links shown in the catalog were made public with attachment headers so clicks start real downloads, GME no longer exposes a local file:// path as if it were an upstream source, and each supervisor page now presents a compact Input -> Operation -> Output workflow strip. Next exact action: build GE suites/checkpoints for the frozen normalized artifacts and publish their validation outputs into the same static supervisor surface.
